title: How To Tell If Someone Is Attracted To You
text: do you know when someone is attracted to you so one of the most frequent questions we get here at the science people is how do I know if someone is attracted to me and so on Twitter we decided asked our followers if they agreed or disagreed with the statements I know when someone is attracted to me true or false 53% of you said true 47% of you said false so about evenly split so I thought I had to do a video on a couple of signs you know if someone's attracted you so the very first thing is something called proxemics so proxemics is the fancy-schmancy body language word for space between people what happens is we like something or someone whether that's a delicious cake or a handsome man or a beautiful woman is we want to move towards that thing that item that we like so whenever you have someone who's leaning in towards you who's reaching out towards you who wants to stand closer to you or be in your physical closer physical distance or your intimacy zone you know that someone at least likes you and this is a micro message of like you don't necessarily know attraction but you know there's something positive happening there so paying attention to the space around you and how many times they come into your intimate zone that's about eighteen inches away from your body the second thing you want to watch out for is haptics so haptics is another fancy schmancy term for touch so when we have touch as humans it makes us feel all warm and gushy inside and the reason for that is because the moment we have in the skin touch we release what's called oxytocin oxytocin is the chemical of bonding it's like data that feeling that we get one like whew I really like that person that's actually oxytocin coursing through your bloodstream so when someone wants to reach out and physically have that skin-to-skin contact they're trying to produce the hormone that makes you feel bonded so if someone reeks that reaches out and shake your hands that's a pretty good one but if someone reaches out and touches your forearm or puts the hand on your upper arm puts it on your shoulder or better yet gives you a hug you're going to have more off chosen so I want you to count how many times they reach out to cross that touch boundary

title: How To Tell If Someone Is Attracted To You
text: es out and touches your forearm or puts the hand on your upper arm puts it on your shoulder or better yet gives you a hug you're going to have more off chosen so I want you to count how many times they reach out to cross that touch boundary every time they reach out and want to produce it oxytocin that's a pretty good indication they want to have some kind of bond with you the last thing I would advise you to look out for is eye contact so the other thing that produces oxytocin other than touch is mutual gazing says when you are both looking at each other as you were speaking or as you are listening the more eye contact you have the more bonded you feel with someone the more oxytocin you produce so I want you to pay attention when you're talking to them are they looking off into space are they checking their phone are they looking down onto the side or are they looking straight at you that is a signal that they want to have that kind of bond that kind of chemical oxytocin it so there's three really easy things you can look out for to see if someone is attracted to you because I never ever want you to miss a mutual crush did you like this video please give us a little like or subscribe to our channel we are so grateful because we put out new videos every week thank you thank you thank you
